# Wire ContentNormaliser into Content Providers

> **Milestone**: M1.3 | **Task**: T1.3.2.3.1.3
> **Depends on**: T1.3.2.3.1.1 (ContentNormaliser implementation — COMPLETE)
> **Skills to load**: `riverpod-providers`

---

## Task

Replace two fallback text-processing code paths with calls to the existing `ContentNormaliser`. This is the last wiring step to close E1.3.2 (Content Pipeline Cleanup) and M1.3 entirely.

**ContentNormaliser API** (already implemented at `lib/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart`):

```dart
class ContentNormaliser {
  static Future<ExtractedDocument> normalise(String input, ContentType type) async;
}

enum ContentType { plainText, markdown, html }
```

The normaliser handles isolate offloading internally (>10KB → `Isolate.run()`), produces `ExtractedDocument` with sentences, page boundaries, and totalPages.

---

## Files to Modify

### 1. `lib/features/content/providers/file_picker_provider.dart`

**Add import** (after existing imports):

```dart
import 'package:runthru/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart';
```

**Replace** the `_extractFile` method's `txt`/`md`/`html` cases (lines ~148–153):

```dart
// BEFORE:
case 'txt':
case 'md':
case 'html':
  // Read file content and process as text.
  // Will be replaced by ContentNormaliser in E1.3.2.
  final content = await File(filePath).readAsString();
  final doc = ClipboardDocument.fromClipboardText(content);
  return doc.document;

// AFTER:
case 'txt':
  final content = await File(filePath).readAsString();
  return ContentNormaliser.normalise(content, ContentType.plainText);
case 'md':
  final content = await File(filePath).readAsString();
  return ContentNormaliser.normalise(content, ContentType.markdown);
case 'html':
  final content = await File(filePath).readAsString();
  return ContentNormaliser.normalise(content, ContentType.html);
```

**Remove the `ClipboardDocument` import** if it's no longer used anywhere in the file (check — it's only used in the block being replaced).

---

### 2. `lib/features/content/providers/share_intent_provider.dart`

**Add import** (after existing imports):

```dart
import 'package:runthru/features/content/services/content_normaliser.dart';
```

**Replace** the `SharedContentType.htmlText` case in `_extractContent` (lines ~166–170):

```dart
// BEFORE:
case SharedContentType.htmlText:
  // Strip HTML and process as text for now.
  // Will be replaced by ContentNormaliser in E1.3.2.
  final stripped = _basicHtmlStrip(content.data);
  final doc = ClipboardDocument.fromClipboardText(stripped);
  return doc.document;

// AFTER:
case SharedContentType.htmlText:
  return ContentNormaliser.normalise(content.data, ContentType.html);
```

**Also replace** the `SharedContentType.text` case to use the normaliser for better sentence tokenisation:

```dart
// BEFORE:
case SharedContentType.text:
  final doc = ClipboardDocument.fromClipboardText(content.data);
  return doc.document;

// AFTER:
case SharedContentType.text:
  return ContentNormaliser.normalise(content.data, ContentType.plainText);
```

**Delete the `_basicHtmlStrip` static method** (lines ~188–212) — it's fully superseded by `ContentNormaliser._stripHtml`.

**Keep the `ClipboardDocument` import** — it's still used by the `SharedContentType.url` case (which is out of scope for this task).

---

## Run Codegen

After modifying providers, regenerate:

```bash
dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

The `.g.dart` files for these providers shouldn't change (no state shape changes), but run it to be safe.

---

## Verification

```bash
dart analyze lib/features/content/providers/
flutter test test/features/content/services/content_normaliser_test.dart
dart analyze --fatal-infos
```

All must pass with zero issues.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `file_picker_provider.dart` uses `ContentNormaliser.normalise()` for `.txt`, `.md`, `.html` files — each with correct `ContentType`
- [ ] `share_intent_provider.dart` uses `ContentNormaliser.normalise()` for `htmlText` intents
- [ ] `share_intent_provider.dart` uses `ContentNormaliser.normalise()` for plain `text` intents
- [ ] `_basicHtmlStrip()` method is deleted from `share_intent_provider.dart`
- [ ] `ClipboardDocument` import removed from `file_picker_provider.dart` (no longer needed)
- [ ] `ClipboardDocument` import kept in `share_intent_provider.dart` (still used by `url` case)
- [ ] `dart analyze lib/features/content/providers/` reports zero issues
- [ ] ContentNormaliser tests still pass
- [ ] No new test failures introduced

---

## What NOT to Do

- Do NOT modify `ContentNormaliser` itself — it's already tested and complete
- Do NOT modify `pdf_extractor.dart` or `epub_extractor.dart` — their extractors remain as-is
- Do NOT add new tests in this task — the normaliser is already tested; provider tests are out of scope for this wiring step
- Do NOT touch `lib/core/clipboard_document.dart` — it's still used by `clipboard_service.dart`
- Do NOT modify the `url` case in `share_intent_provider.dart` — URL fetching is a future task

---

## You May Refuse If

- `ContentNormaliser.normalise()` signature doesn't match `(String, ContentType) → Future<ExtractedDocument>`
- `ClipboardDocument` is still imported elsewhere in `file_picker_provider.dart` after changes (check before removing)
- `dart analyze` shows pre-existing errors in these files (report them instead)
